title: Junior Instructional Designer at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd!
